25%

Food shortage before the new season

Shortage overview

Set how much food each monster receives at the lair. Automatic allocations are proportional to need and favour monsters with fewer fat reserves. Food beyond captive production and stored meat is bought by selling whole treasure units nearest the human entry point; excess purchased meat is stored.

Monster allocations

Treasure and food

Reducing this automatically redistributes the resulting food among all monsters.
